requirement_topic.en: Market Access — No UKCA Marking, Import Duties, UK Timber Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——无需UKCA标志、进口关税、英国木材法规
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——無需UKCA標誌、進口關稅、英國木材法規

summary.en: Three distinct market access rules apply to Chinese furniture entering the UK: (1) UKCA marking — unlike electrical products, furniture has NO mandatory UKCA (UK Conformity Assessed) marking requirement; the absence of UKCA is not a gap — furniture simply does not fall under any UK UKCA-designated legislation. (2) Import duties — since Brexit, UK Global Tariff applies to Chinese furniture: HS 9401 (seats) and HS 9403 (other furniture) attract import duty rates of 0–6.5% under the UK Global Tariff (tariff varies by sub-heading); no MFN preferential rate exists for China under current UK trade policy as of 2026. Anti-dumping duties may apply to specific products. (3) UK Timber Regulations (UKTR) — the UK Timber Regulations (SI 2021/1158, successor to EU EUTR) prohibit placing illegally harvested timber on the GB market and require due diligence systems for timber and timber products (including wooden furniture) placed on the GB market by operators.
summary.zh: 进入英国的中国家具须遵循三项不同的市场准入规则：（1）UKCA标志——与电气产品不同，家具无强制性UKCA（英国合格评定）标志要求；无UKCA并非差距——家具本不属于任何英国UKCA指定立法范畴。（2）进口关税——脱欧后，英国全球关税适用于中国家具：HS 9401（座椅）和HS 9403（其他家具）依英国全球关税征收0–6.5%进口关税（税率因子目录不同而有所差异）；截至2026年，中国在英国现行贸易政策下无最惠国优惠税率。特定产品可能适用反倾销税。（3）英国木材法规（UKTR）——《英国木材法规》（SI 2021/1158，欧盟EUTR的继任法规）禁止将非法采伐木材投放大不列颠市场，并要求经营者对在大不列颠市场投放的木材及木制品（包括木质家具）建立尽职调查体系。
summary.zht: 進入英國的中國家具須遵循三項不同的市場准入規則：（1）UKCA標誌——與電氣產品不同，家具無強制性UKCA（英國合格評定）標誌要求；無UKCA並非差距——家具本不屬於任何英國UKCA指定立法範疇。（2）進口關稅——脫歐後，英國全球關稅適用於中國家具：HS 9401（座椅）和HS 9403（其他家具）依英國全球關稅徵收0–6.5%進口關稅（稅率因子目錄不同而有所差異）；截至2026年，中國在英國現行貿易政策下無最惠國優惠稅率。特定產品可能適用反傾銷稅。（3）英國木材法規（UKTR）——《英國木材法規》（SI 2021/1158，歐盟EUTR的繼任法規）禁止將非法採伐木材投放大不列顛市場，並要求經營者對在大不列顛市場投放的木材及木製品（包括木質家具）建立盡職調查體系。

standards_or_laws: UK Timber Regulations (Timber and Timber Products (Placing on the Market) Regulations 2013 as amended by SI 2021/1158)
UK Customs and Excise Management Act 1979 (border enforcement)

summary.en: China does not have an equivalent to the UK Timber Regulations — there is no mandatory due diligence system for timber sourcing for export furniture. China's timber traceability system (国家木材追溯体系) is voluntary and primarily for domestic use. Chinese furniture exporters typically provide FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) or PEFC certificates voluntarily for European buyers, but these are not legally required in China. On the Chinese export side, China Customs applies export commodity inspection (CIQ) under GACC for certain wood products, but this does not satisfy UK UKTR due diligence requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有等同于英国木材法规的制度——对出口家具的木材采购不存在强制性尽职调查体系。中国的木材追溯体系（国家木材追溯体系）为自愿性质，主要用于国内。中国家具出口商通常自愿为欧洲买家提供FSC（森林管理委员会）或PEFC证书，但中国法律并无此强制要求。在中国出口端，中国海关对部分木制品依据GACC实施出口商品检验（CIQ），但这不满足英国UKTR尽职调查要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有等同於英國木材法規的制度——對出口家具的木材採購不存在強制性盡職調查體系。中國的木材追溯體系（國家木材追溯體系）為自願性質，主要用於國內。中國家具出口商通常自願為歐洲買家提供FSC（森林管理委員會）或PEFC證書，但中國法律並無此強制要求。在中國出口端，中國海關對部分木製品依據GACC實施出口商品檢驗（CIQ），但這不滿足英國UKTR盡職調查要求。

standards_or_laws: China Customs / GACC export inspection for wood products (voluntary/selective)

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) UKTR due diligence — UK importers of wooden furniture must establish and maintain a due diligence system covering: description of timber species and country of harvest, supply chain documentation, and risk assessment; failure is a criminal offence for the UK importer; Chinese exporters should prepare timber sourcing documentation (species, country of harvest, FSC/PEFC or equivalent chain of custody) to support UK importers' UKTR compliance; (2) Import duties — 0–6.5% duty applies at UK border; anti-dumping investigation risk exists for certain furniture categories; correct HS code classification is importer's responsibility; (3) UKCA non-requirement — exporters should NOT voluntarily affix UKCA to furniture as it would imply a legal designation that does not exist for this category, potentially creating misleading impressions.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）UKTR尽职调查——英国木质家具进口商须建立并维持尽职调查体系，涵盖：木材树种及采伐国说明、供应链文件及风险评估；违规对英国进口商构成刑事犯罪；中国出口商应准备木材采购文件（树种、采伐国、FSC/PEFC或等效产销监管链）以支持英国进口商的UKTR合规；（2）进口关税——英国边境适用0–6.5%关税；部分家具类别存在反倾销调查风险；正确的HS编码分类由进口商负责；（3）UKCA非强制性——出口商不应自愿在家具上贴附UKCA，因为该类别不存在相应的法律指定，可能产生误导。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）UKTR盡職調查——英國木質家具進口商須建立並維持盡職調查體系，涵蓋：木材樹種及採伐國說明、供應鏈文件及風險評估；違規對英國進口商構成刑事犯罪；中國出口商應準備木材採購文件（樹種、採伐國、FSC/PEFC或等效產銷監管鏈）以支持英國進口商的UKTR合規；（2）進口關稅——英國邊境適用0–6.5%關稅；部分家具類別存在反傾銷調查風險；正確的HS編碼分類由進口商負責；（3）UKCA非強制性——出口商不應自願在家具上貼附UKCA，因為該類別不存在相應的法律指定，可能產生誤導。

mandatory_status.target: UKTR mandatory for UK importers of timber/wooden furniture; import duties mandatory; UKCA marking NOT required for furniture
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent UKTR obligation exists in Chinese law; voluntary FSC/PEFC certification available

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk — UK Timber Regulations (SI 2013/2987 as amended)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Furniture from China does not require UKCA marking (no designated legislation applies). UK import duties of 0–6.5% apply under the UK Global Tariff. UK Timber Regulations require UK importers of wooden furniture to maintain due diligence on timber sourcing — Chinese exporters should prepare species/origin documentation. Anti-dumping duties may apply to specific furniture categories.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自中国的家具无需UKCA标志（无适用的指定立法）。英国全球关税下适用0–6.5%进口关税。英国木材法规要求英国木质家具进口商对木材采购保持尽职调查——中国出口商应准备树种/原产地文件。特定家具类别可能适用反倾销税。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自中國的家具無需UKCA標誌（無適用的指定立法）。英國全球關稅下適用0–6.5%進口關稅。英國木材法規要求英國木質家具進口商對木材採購保持盡職調查——中國出口商應準備樹種/原產地文件。特定家具類別可能適用反傾銷稅。
